## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on operational improvements and team restructuring for GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Urgent need to improve workflow usage and polishing instructions across teams](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Immediate action required on underperforming team members; several firings planned](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Shift in CM role from writers to editors, with focus on leveraging AI tools effectively](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Strategy sprint kickoff and sales pipeline showing positive momentum](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)

## Topics

### Workflow and Polishing Instructions Improvement

  - [90% of output quality issues potentially solvable through better polishing instructions](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Many CMs not fully utilizing workflows or relying heavily on ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Average polishing instructions only \~400 words, severely limiting output quality](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Plan to consolidate institutional knowledge into polishing instructions](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Shift needed from writer mindset to editorial mindset for CMs](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Team Restructuring and Performance Management

  - [Several underperforming team members identified for immediate termination (e.g., Christelle, Alexandra)](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)
  - [Need for more technical, AI-native profiles like Marisol](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=601.0)
  - [Aim to hire 2+ full-stack developer/editor hybrids for developer tool content](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Potential to reduce ME count from 10-12 to 6-7 if production issues resolved](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [Daily 25-minute standups proposed for all CMs to ensure accountability](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)

### Client Management and Strategy

  - [GetPod account facing issues due to lack of technical ME and unclear strategy](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Adventures Group hired their own editor, indicating quality concerns](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=1280.0)
  - [Strategy sprint kickoff scheduled with promising team dynamics](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Focus on improving director-level client management](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=146.0)

### Operational Improvements

  - [Centralizing content production under Matthew's "news desk" structure](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Aiming for 5 accounts per CM and ME with improved workflows](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Marcel and Andy focusing on director-level improvements](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Sales pipeline showing signs of recovery with new deals closing](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matthew to immediately action terminations and send company-wide note on audit and expectations](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
  - [Implement daily CM standups for accountability and workflow improvement](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
  - [Continue workflow improvement project with Daryl, Megan, and Nana](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=1098.0)
  - [Marcel to focus on director-level improvements and strategy sprint validation](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
  - [Plan 4-day in-person meeting for directors in late June](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [Recruit more technical, AI-native profiles for content production roles](https://fathom.video/share/kwyzxvcRv4bjx59jpaC3G8t3jzpmUMH1?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
